zh.lifeSummary: 當John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish於1430年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾德古爾時，他的父親Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour14歲，母親Evere Cameron16歲。他於大約1460年與Mrs. Anne MacLean在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish于1430年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾德古爾时，他的父亲Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour14岁，母亲Evere Cameron16岁。他于大约1460年与Mrs. Anne MacLean在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: MacLean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Roy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Scottish name, representing an Anglicized spelling of the Gaelic nickname Ruadh ‘red’. It has since spread to other parts of the English-speaking world, where it is often reanalysed as Old French roy ‘king’ ( compare Leroy ).

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

nameMeanings.name: Iain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish was born in 1430, in Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour, was 14 and his mother, Evere Cameron, was 16. He married Mrs. Anne MacLean about 1460, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish est né en 1430, à Ardgour, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Evere Cameron, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Anne MacLean environ 1460, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish 1430 in Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour 14 und seine Mutter Evere Cameron 16. Er hat um 1460 in Scotland Mrs. Anne MacLean geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish è nato il nel 1430 nel Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Evere Cameron, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Anne MacLean circa 1460, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Treshnish, Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotlan: スコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ ムル

ja.lifeSummary: John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnishが1430年にスコットランドアルグイルアルドゴウルで生まれた時，父Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgourは14歳，母Evere Cameronは16歳であった。約1460年にスコットランドでMrs. Anne MacLeanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish(이)가 1430년 스컷랜드 아그이 아지우르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Evere Cameron(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1460년 스컷랜드에서 Mrs. Anne MacLean(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish nasceu em 1430, em Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Evere Cameron, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Anne MacLean aproximadamente 1460, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish родился в 1430 г. в местности арджоур, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Evere Cameron, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Anne MacLean около 1460 г. в местности Шотландия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Roy or Iain Ruadh MacLean 1st. of Treshnish nació en 1430, en Ardgour, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Donald MacLean 1st Laird of Ardgour, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Evere Cameron, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Mrs. Anne MacLean aproximadamente 1460, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
